new_fact.template: A new fact has been learned in the domain '{domain}' with key '{key}'. The value is: {new_value}. Please provide a concise human-readable explanation of this new fact and its significance. {kg_insights}
new_fact.description: Template for explaining newly learned facts

updated_fact.template: A fact in the domain '{domain}' with key '{key}' has been updated. The previous value was: {old_value}. The new value is: {new_value}. The changes are: {diff}. Please explain the update, highlight the changes, and comment on their significance. {kg_insights}
updated_fact.description: Template for explaining fact updates with change tracking

unchanged_fact.template: The fact in the domain '{domain}' with key '{key}' remained the same, but its metadata might have been refreshed. Please provide a brief explanation of what this fact represents. {kg_insights}

conflict_resolution.template: A conflict has been detected in domain '{domain}' for key '{key}'. Current value: {current_value}. Conflicting value: {conflicting_value}. Sources: {sources}. Knowledge graph analysis: {kg_insights}. Please analyze this conflict and suggest a resolution strategy.

batch_summary.template: Batch learning completed for domain '{domain}'. Total facts processed: {total_facts}. New facts: {new_facts}. Updated facts: {updated_facts}. Failed validations: {failed_facts}. Time taken: {processing_time}ms. Please provide an executive summary of this batch learning operation and highlight any significant patterns or anomalies.
batch_summary.description: Template for batch learning operation summaries

security_alert.template: SECURITY ALERT: Suspicious activity detected in domain '{domain}'. Event type: {event_type}. Details: {details}. User: {user_id}. Timestamp: {timestamp}. Risk level: {risk_level}. Please provide a security assessment and recommended actions.

data_quality_assessment.template: Data quality assessment for domain '{domain}', key '{key}'. Completeness: {completeness_score}%. Accuracy confidence: {accuracy_score}%. Consistency with related facts: {consistency_score}%. Age of data: {data_age}. Source reliability: {source_reliability}. Please provide a comprehensive data quality report and recommendations.

compliance_check.template: Compliance verification for domain '{domain}'. Regulation: {regulation}. Data classification: {classification}. Retention policy: {retention_policy}. Encryption status: {encryption_status}. Access controls: {access_controls}. Please assess compliance status and identify any gaps.

performance_analysis.template: Performance analysis for learning operation. Domain: {domain}. Processing time: {processing_time}ms. Memory usage: {memory_usage}MB. Cache hit rate: {cache_hit_rate}%. Database queries: {db_queries}. Redis operations: {redis_ops}. Please analyze the performance metrics and suggest optimizations.

audit_trail.template: Audit trail entry for domain '{domain}', key '{key}'. Action: {action}. User: {user_id}. Timestamp: {timestamp}. IP Address: {ip_address}. Session ID: {session_id}. Merkle proof: {merkle_proof}. Previous hash: {previous_hash}. Please generate a tamper-evident audit record.
